title: Microsoft Silverlight 4 Training
description:
This Microsoft Silverlight 4 training covers concepts from the Basic level to advance level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Microsoft Silverlight 4 training as per your pace.

Microsoft Silverlight is an application framework for writing and running rich internet applications that was actively developed and marketed by Microsoft in the year 2007,which is similar to Adobe Flash.Silverlight is a powerful development tool for creating, engaging, interactive user experiences for both web and mobile applications. Silverlight application is a free plug-in, powered by the .NET framework and compatible with multiple browsers, devices and operating systems, bringing a new level of interactivity wherever the web works.Microsoft released its fourth updated version of Silverlight, called Microsoft Silverlight 4 in the year April 15, 2010.Silverlight can also be used to create Windows Sidebar gadgets for Windows Vista. Silverlight provides a retained mode graphics system similar to Windows Presentation Foundation (WPF), and integrates multimedia, graphics, animations, and interactivity into a single run-time environment. In Silverlight applications, user interfaces are declared in Extensible Application Markup Language (XAML) and programmed using a subset of the .NET Framework.

Ø  Microsoft Silverlight 4 provides support for Google's Chrome browser.
